name: aurora-attachment
title: Aurora Attachment
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Six attachment UI variants: inline rose-tinted chip (with image thumbnail), media grid with hover overlay, tall doc/PDF card with file-type badge and page count, animated audio chip with 5 waveform bars, upload progress tracker with fixed-80px accent-fill track, and drag-and-drop zone.
docs:
Aurora block that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/attachment.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`.
